package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for manual_required_checks_after_validate_tags_available: Handlers that re-check required fields manually even though struct-tag validation already exists.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule080NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule080NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule080NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario080Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule080NegativeService, input Rule080NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
